# OneLeet

> OneLeet is an AI-powered preparation platform for the LEET (Lateral Entry Entrance Test), which lets diploma holders in India get direct admission into the 2nd year of a B.Tech / B.E. degree. OneLeet offers real previous-year papers, exam-pattern mock tests, notes and unlimited AI practice. A unit of StaplerLabs Private Limited.

## Start here
- [LEET preparation guide (pillar)](https://www.oneleet.in/leet/)
- [Opportunities after a diploma (lateral entry)](https://www.oneleet.in/leet/after-diploma/)
- [LEET eligibility](https://www.oneleet.in/leet/eligibility/)
- [LEET syllabus](https://www.oneleet.in/leet/syllabus/)
- [LEET exam pattern & marking](https://www.oneleet.in/leet/exam-pattern/)
- [How to prepare for LEET](https://www.oneleet.in/leet/how-to-prepare/)

## Practice
- [LEET previous year papers](https://www.oneleet.in/leet/previous-year-papers/)
- [LEET mock tests](https://www.oneleet.in/leet/mock-tests/)
- [Subjects & topics](https://www.oneleet.in/leet/subjects/)

- [LEET in Bihar](https://www.oneleet.in/leet/bihar/)

- [LEET in Maharashtra](https://www.oneleet.in/leet/maharashtra/)
